physicsSubsteps.title: Physics Substeps
physicsSubsteps.description: Minimum Oimo steps per frame. More steps reduce tunneling through thin goal geometry. Adaptive mode can add extra steps when the ball is fast.

maxPhysicsSubsteps.title: Max Physics Substeps
maxPhysicsSubsteps.description: Hard cap on steps per frame when adaptive substeps are enabled.

adaptiveBallSubsteps.title: Adaptive Ball Substeps
adaptiveBallSubsteps.description: Adds extra physics substeps based on ball linear speed (from ballController) to reduce tunneling on hard shots.

adaptiveSubstepSpeed.title: Adaptive Speed Divisor
adaptiveSubstepSpeed.description: Extra steps equal floor ballSpeed / this value. Lower means more extra steps for the same speed.

solverIterations.title: Solver Iterations
solverIterations.description: Contact solver iterations per substep. Higher can stabilize fast impacts. Default Oimo is 8.

isSensor.title: Sensor
isSensor.description: Net / goal volume: collision group 2, no solid contact with the ball. Turn on for the net entity only (Body Type Static).

belongsTo.title: Collision group
belongsTo.description: belongsTo bitmask. Use 0 for default (1). Ignored when Sensor is enabled.

collidesWith.title: Collides with mask
collidesWith.description: 0 = auto: all groups except sensor group 2 for normal bodies; all groups for sensor bodies.

multiplyShapeByEntityScale.title: Shape times entity scale
multiplyShapeByEntityScale.description: When true, box/cylinder sizes and sphere radius are multiplied by entity local scale. Use if goal mesh is scaled in Transform but oimo sizes look tiny (ball passes through visuals).

liftFactor.title: Lift Factor
liftFactor.description: Fraction of forward power applied as upward velocity (0 = ground ball, 0.5 = high arc)

shotPower.title: Shot Power
shotPower.description: Base forward speed multiplier. Higher = faster shots.

speedToPowerScale.title: Speed To Power Scale
speedToPowerScale.description: Converts swipe speed (px/s) to power. Lower = need faster swipes for full power.

maxLiftSpeed.title: Max Lift Speed
maxLiftSpeed.description: Hard cap on upward velocity (vy). Prevents powerful swipes from sending the ball too high.

lateralAimGain.title: Lateral Aim Gain
lateralAimGain.description: How much swipe angle translates to lateral aim. 0 = always center, 1 = full angle.

minSwipeToLaunch.title: Min Swipe To Launch (px)
minSwipeToLaunch.description: Minimum swipe distance in screen pixels before the ball fires.

curveForce.title: Curve Force
curveForce.description: Max lateral acceleration from curve (world units/s^2). Higher = wider curves.

curveFollowScale.title: Curve Follow Scale
curveFollowScale.description: How strongly finger lateral movement maps to ball velocity. Lower = subtler curves.

physicsEntity.title: Physics Entity
physicsEntity.description: Entity that has the oimoBody script. Leave empty if oimoBody is on this same entity.

ballRadius.title: Ball Radius
ballRadius.description: Sphere radius (match oimoBody). Used to scale roll angular velocity.

rollSpinScale.title: Roll Spin Scale
rollSpinScale.description: Launch roll from shot direction. Use 0 for none. Oimo friction can still spin the ball on the ground unless Freeze angular is on.

airDrag.title: Air Drag
airDrag.description: Velocity damping while airborne (0 = no drag, 1 = heavy drag). Simulates air resistance for realistic deceleration.

groundDrag.title: Ground Drag
groundDrag.description: Velocity damping while on ground (0 = no drag, 1 = heavy drag). Simulates grass friction slowing the ball.

freezeAngularVelocity.title: Freeze Angular
freezeAngularVelocity.description: After each physics step, clear angular velocity so the mesh does not roll from friction or impacts. Use for a non spinning look.

keeperEntity.title: Keeper Entity
keeperEntity.description: Goalkeeper entity with oimoBody. Used to detect saves via physics contacts.

goalPoints.title: Goal Points
goalPoints.description: Points awarded for a regular goal

topBinBonus.title: Top Bin Bonus
topBinBonus.description: Extra points for hitting the top bin

outOfBoundsY.title: Out of Bounds Y
outOfBoundsY.description: Y threshold below which the ball is a miss

missMarginZ.title: Miss Margin Z
missMarginZ.description: How far past the goal line Z before calling a miss

debugOutcome.title: Debug Outcome
debugOutcome.description: Log goal / auto-miss / resolve path (use when goal FX or SFX skip)

goalBackEntity.title: Goal Back Collider
goalBackEntity.description: Entity with oimoBody (back of the net / goal line). A touching contact with the ball while the ball is live counts as a goal.

awayFromGoalVz.title: Away From Goal (min vz)
awayFromGoalVz.description: After the wait above: if the ball is still in front of the goal line (Z greater than goalLineZ) and world Z velocity is above this (positive = back toward kicker; shots use negative vz toward the goal), the round ends as a miss. Game Manager applies Round Reset Delay.

maxRoundTime.title: Max Round Time (s)
maxRoundTime.description: Safety auto-miss if the round lasts this long while the ball is live. 0 = off.

missAfterHitDelay.title: Wait After Hit Before Reflect Miss (s)
missAfterHitDelay.description: After the first collision, wait this long (and only if a goal has not been scored) before the reflected-away rule can end the round. 0 = check immediately on every frame after hit.

liftSpeedMin.title: Lift Speed Min (px/s)
liftSpeedMin.description: Swipe speed at or below which the ball stays low (minimum lift). A gentle controlled flick produces a ground shot.

liftSpeedMax.title: Lift Speed Max (px/s)
liftSpeedMax.description: Swipe speed at or above which the ball reaches full lift. A fast powerful flick produces a high arc.

liftMinFraction.title: Lift Min Fraction
liftMinFraction.description: Lift multiplier at slowest swipes (0 = true ground ball, 0.3 = slight rise even on gentle swipes)

ballEntity.title: Ball Entity
ballEntity.description: The ball with an oimoBody script

netSensor.title: Net Sensor
netSensor.description: Entity defining goal box size or position. Use oimoBody sensor group 2 only. Remove PlayCanvas rigidbody/collision from net mesh children so only this volume drives physics.

netFeelEnabled.title: Net Feel
netFeelEnabled.description: While the ball is in the outer net volume, apply extra drag and small random impulses before each physics step.

netOuterWidthScale.title: Net Outer Width Scale
netOuterWidthScale.description: Outer net AABB half-width multiplier versus netSensor size. Outer is used for soft net forces only.

netOuterHeightScale.title: Net Outer Height Scale
netOuterHeightScale.description: Outer net AABB half-height multiplier versus netSensor size.

netOuterDepthScale.title: Net Outer Depth Scale
netOuterDepthScale.description: Outer net AABB half-depth multiplier. Values above 1 let the ball spend more frames in the net shell before scoring.

goalScoreHalfScale.title: Goal Score Half Scale
goalScoreHalfScale.description: Inner scoring box: each half-extent is netSensor half-size times this. Must be smaller than outer so the ball lingers in the net shell.

netLinearDamp.title: Net Linear Damp
netLinearDamp.description: Per-second damping on X and Y velocity while in the outer net (higher = more slowdown).

netForwardDamp.title: Net Forward Damp
netForwardDamp.description: Extra per-second damping on Z velocity into the goal while in the outer net.

netAngularDamp.title: Net Angular Damp
netAngularDamp.description: Per-second damping on spin while in the outer net.

netRandomImpulseMax.title: Net Random Lateral
netRandomImpulseMax.description: Max random lateral velocity push per second while in net (world units). Scaled by physics timestep.

netRandomForwardImpulse.title: Net Random Forward
netRandomForwardImpulse.description: Max random Z velocity jitter per second while in net (usually keep lower than lateral).

ballEntity.title: Ball Entity
ballEntity.description: The ball with an oimoBody script

reactionDelay.title: Reaction Delay
reactionDelay.description: Seconds before the keeper starts diving after ball launch

diveRange.title: Dive Range
diveRange.description: Max X distance the keeper can cover from center

jumpHeight.title: Jump Height
jumpHeight.description: Peak height of the dive jump above rest Y

gravity.title: Gravity
gravity.description: Downward acceleration during dive (higher = snappier fall)

slowMoDuration.title: Slow-Mo Duration
slowMoDuration.description: Real-time seconds of slow motion (hold phase, excluding ease-in/out)

trailParticleEntity.title: Trail Particle Entity
trailParticleEntity.description: Child of ball with Particle System. Used when Ribbon Trail is off.

scoreTextEntity.title: Score Text Entity
scoreTextEntity.description: Screen-space Text element for floating score pop-ups

ribbonTrail.title: Ribbon Trail
ribbonTrail.description: Mesh ribbon from position history. Turn off to use particle trail only.

ribbonHitIgnoreSec.title: Ribbon Hit Ignore Sec
ribbonHitIgnoreSec.description: After launch ignore solid contacts for this time so the ball resting on the pitch does not clear the trail.

ribbonSoftness.title: Ribbon Softness
ribbonSoftness.description: Higher gentler alpha and width along the trail so the tail looks softer.

ribbonShrinkPointsPerSec.title: Ribbon Shrink Speed
ribbonShrinkPointsPerSec.description: After emission stops oldest points are removed per second until gone. Use 0 to keep the path until ball reset.

ribbonParticleLook.title: Ribbon Particle Look
ribbonParticleLook.description: Feathered edges across the width and soft additive-alpha blending like default billboard particles.

ribbonEdgeAlpha.title: Ribbon Edge Alpha
ribbonEdgeAlpha.description: Edge vertices alpha as a fraction of center. Lower softer puffier cross-section.

debugFeedback.title: Debug Feedback
debugFeedback.description: Log goal / reset / slow-mo and timeScale changes

slowMoEaseIn.title: Slow-Mo Ease In
slowMoEaseIn.description: Real-time seconds to ramp from normal speed down to slow-mo

slowMoEaseOut.title: Slow-Mo Ease Out
slowMoEaseOut.description: Real-time seconds to ramp from slow-mo back to normal speed

ballEntity.title: Ball Entity
ballEntity.description: The ball entity with ballController script

ballsLeftText.title: Balls Left Text
ballsLeftText.description: UI Text element showing remaining balls

scoreText.title: Score Text
scoreText.description: UI Text element showing goal count

gameOverScreen.title: Game Over Screen
gameOverScreen.description: UI panel shown on game over (should contain a restart button)

restartButton.title: Restart Button
restartButton.description: Always-visible UI button that restarts the game

debugFlow.title: Debug Flow
debugFlow.description: Log goal / miss / save and reset timer scheduling

missText.title: Miss Text
missText.description: UI Text element showing miss count (game:miss only; not goals or saves)

resetDelayAfterBarrier.title: Round Reset Delay
resetDelayAfterBarrier.description: Seconds after goal, miss, or save — then the ball resets and you can shoot again. Use 0 for an immediate reset.

uiTextPopDuration.title: HUD Text Pop Duration
uiTextPopDuration.description: Seconds for goal / miss / balls-left bounce animation

uiTextPopScale.title: HUD Text Pop Scale
uiTextPopScale.description: Peak scale during bounce (higher = more dramatic)

ballEntity.title: Ball Entity
ballEntity.description: The ball with an oimoBody script

reactionDelay.title: Reaction Delay
reactionDelay.description: Seconds after ball launch before this character jumps

jumpHeight.title: Jump Height
jumpHeight.description: Peak height of the jump above rest Y

gravity.title: Gravity
gravity.description: Downward acceleration during jump (higher = snappier landing)

jumpChance.title: Jump Chance
jumpChance.description: Probability (0-1) that this character jumps on each shot. Lower values add variety.

wallType.title: Wall Type
wallType.description: Behavior type: 0 = jump in place, 1 = shuffle on X axis + jump

moveSpeed.title: Move Speed (X)
moveSpeed.description: Horizontal shuffle speed (only used by Moving wall type)

moveRange.title: Move Range (X)
moveRange.description: Max distance from rest position on X axis (only used by Moving wall type)

swipeDeltaY.title: Swipe Delta Y
swipeDeltaY.description: Vertical travel in UI units (positive = up)

pauseDuration.title: Pause Duration
pauseDuration.description: Seconds of rest (invisible) before the next loop

swipeCurve.title: Swipe Curve
swipeCurve.description: Lateral arc perpendicular to swipe. Positive = right, negative = left.

holdDuration.title: Hold Duration
holdDuration.description: Seconds the finger rests on the ball before swiping

ballEntity.title: Ball Entity
ballEntity.description: The ball with an oimoBody script (used for hit-to-character contact detection)

wallParent.title: Wall Parent
wallParent.description: Parent entity whose children are the free-kick wall characters (each must have an oimoBody script)

hitCooldown.title: Hit Cooldown (ms)
hitCooldown.description: Minimum milliseconds between successive hit-to-character sounds

debugSfx.title: Debug SFX
debugSfx.description: Log slot play attempts and skip reasons (missing slot, disabled entity)

ballEntity.title: Ball Entity
ballEntity.description: The ball to track during flight

returnSpeed.title: Return Speed
returnSpeed.description: How fast the camera glides back to idle after reset

followFraction.title: Follow Fraction
followFraction.description: Camera moves this fraction of the ball displacement (0.3 = 30 percent of ball travel)

lookAtWeight.title: Look-At Weight
lookAtWeight.description: How strongly the camera rotates toward the ball (0 = fixed, 1 = fully looks at ball)

positionSmoothing.title: Position Smoothing
positionSmoothing.description: How fast the camera glides to its target (lower = smoother)

trackForwardMax.title: Track Forward Max
trackForwardMax.description: Max forward offset toward goal (this is the main follow axis)

trackVerticalMax.title: Track Vertical Max
trackVerticalMax.description: Max upward offset when ball rises

lookAtSmoothing.title: Look-At Smoothing
lookAtSmoothing.description: How fast the gaze follows the ball (lower = steadier)

forwardZLimit.title: Forward Z Limit
forwardZLimit.description: Camera will never move more than this distance forward from its idle position (keeps the goal visible)

rampUpTime.title: Ramp-Up Time
rampUpTime.description: Seconds after launch before camera reaches full tracking strength (prevents initial flick)

goalShakeDuration.title: Goal Shake Duration
goalShakeDuration.description: How long the goal shake lasts

launchShakeDuration.title: Launch Shake Duration
launchShakeDuration.description: How long the kick shake lasts
